mapper.select: SELECT ad.*, p.name as project_name, a.remark as account_remark FROM tb_account_detail ad LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON ad.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_account a ON ad.account_id = a.id WHERE ad.id = #{id}

SELECT ad.*, p.name as project_name, a.remark as account_remark FROM tb_account_detail ad LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON ad.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_account a ON ad.account_id = a.id ORDER BY ad.create_time DESC

SELECT ad.*, p.name as project_name, a.remark as account_remark FROM tb_account_detail ad LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON ad.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_account a ON ad.account_id = a.id WHERE ad.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY ad.operate_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_account_detail (project_id, account_id, operator_name, operator_id, action_type, remark, operate_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{accountId}, #{operatorName}, #{operatorId}, #{actionType}, #{remark}, #{operateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_account_detail SET project_id = #{projectId}, account_id = #{accountId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, action_type = #{actionType}, remark = #{remark}, operate_time = #{operateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
